_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with key stakeholders to establish a cybersecurity risk management program
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise risk management frameworks and how data risk, AI risk, and technology risk are integrated into enterprise risk reporting and board-level risk governance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.476), RM-K-012 (RM, cosine: 0.461).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.349). Shared vocabulary: [management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [collaborate, cybersecurity, establish, key, program, stakeholders] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, board, data, enterprise, frameworks, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.885, R=0.884). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Collaborate with key stakeholders to establish a cybersecurity risk management p" and "Knowledge of enterprise risk management frameworks and how data risk, AI risk, a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.489 > STS 0.349 (gap +0.140). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [management, risk]. DCWF-only: [collaborate, cybersecurity, establish, key, program, stakeholders]. WIDAI-only: [ai, board, data, enterprise, frameworks, governance].
